---
title: "bayes_model_final_ds4420"
author: "Kenneth Aldridge, Andrew Sun, Esha Parikh"
date: "2026-04-08"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## DS 4420 Final Project
## Bayesian ML Model
## Kenneth Aldridge, Andy Sun, Esha Parikh

```{r}
# Libraries for model
library(brms)
```
